name: blindspots
description: Find your product's blind spots by dogfooding against specs, running user trials, comparing variants, and interviewing synthetic personas.

interface.shortDescription: Dogfood products with synthetic user personas.
interface.longDescription: Blindspots helps test products through synthetic personas: dogfood against specs, run user trials without insider knowledge, compare variants, and interview personas about their experience.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a blindspots dogfood pass on this product.
